g.text: Inter-File Resolution Rules in Symbol Table

g.title: Normal visibility, visible to all
Hidden outside defining module
Not visible outside defining module
Visible but cannot be preempted
File-local symbol, static linkage
Strong global symbol, visible externally
Weak symbol, can be overridden
LOCAL symbols never participate in inter-file resolution regardless of visibility
LOCAL symbols never participate in inter-file resolution regardless of visibility
LOCAL symbols never participate in inter-file resolution regardless of visibility
LOCAL symbols never participate in inter-file resolution regardless of visibility
GLOBAL + DEFAULT = standard external linkage, participates in resolution
INTERNAL overrides GLOBAL binding for visibility
HIDDEN overrides GLOBAL binding for visibility
Visible externally but cannot be interposed by another definition
WEAK + DEFAULT = participates but can be overridden by strong GLOBAL
INTERNAL overrides WEAK binding for visibility
HIDDEN overrides WEAK binding for visibility
Visible as fallback, cannot be interposed

g.text: STV_DEFAULT (0) | Normal external visibility | Can be preempted
STV_INTERNAL (1) | Hidden outside module | Similar to HIDDEN
STV_HIDDEN (2) | Not in dynamic symtab | Force local scope
Visibility is orthogonal to binding but can restrict export
PARTIAL = Visible but protected from interposition

text.tspan: // Visibility flags have NO effect on LOCAL symbols
// Visibility flags have NO effect on LOCAL symbols
// Overridden by strong GLOBAL with same name
// Overridden by strong GLOBAL with same name
// HIDDEN forces symbol to be file-local
// HIDDEN forces symbol to be file-local
// Visible but cannot be interposed by LD_PRELOAD
// Ensures this definition is always used
// Visible but cannot be interposed by LD_PRELOAD
// Ensures this definition is always used
